speech.translate: речь, выступление, слова, язык, спич, речевой
mnemonic: speech [спи:ч] речь - В своей речи он призвал (спичками) поджечь их село.

examples.eng: I lost my power of speech.
I understood little in his speech.
examples.ru: Я мало что понял в его речи.

examples.eng: His speech was gappy.
He is foreigner by his speech.
He spiked the speech with humour.
Did his speech come across?
Only humans are capable of speech.
She has to make a speech at the convention.
His speech was all rot.
I detected a slight accent in his speech.
examples.ru: Я уловил в его речи лёгкий акцент.

examples.eng: Hamlet's longest speech
How did your speech go down?
He gave a long, flowery speech.
examples.ru: Он выступил с длинной, цветистой речью.

examples.eng: He had to shorten the speech.
I had to interpret the speech to them.
examples.ru: Мне пришлось перевести им эту речь.

examples.eng: She worked a few jokes into her speech.
examples.ru: Она вставила несколько шуток в свою речь.

examples.eng: The speech crowned the meeting.
I missed the point of the speech.
Bob's speech was slurred, and he sounded drunk.
examples.ru: Речь Боба была невнятной и как будто нетрезвой.

examples.eng: Music tricked his speech.
examples.ru: Своё выступление он украсил музыкальными фрагментами.

examples.eng: His speech was inarticulate.
He gave an effective speech.
His speech swayed the voters.
examples.ru: Его речь оказала влияние на избирателей.

examples.eng: He was startled beyond speech.
examples.ru: От изумления он потерял дар речи.

examples.eng: His speech needed gingering up.
examples.ru: Его речь нужно было немного оживить.

examples.eng: He has lost the power of speech.
a staunch defender of free speech
The speech drew out interminably.
The noise drowned out her speech.
His angry speech inflamed the mob.
